channel.title: ninja_zoomies TikTok
channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from ninja_zoomies

item.title: Went on a big group ride! #motorcycle #Fyp #bikelife #biketok #girlsonbikes
item.description: Went on a big group ride! #motorcycle #Fyp #bikelife #biketok #girlsonbikes
item.author: ninja_zoomies

item.title: Always remember to look both ways before you cross I guess #motorcycle #Fyp #bikelife #biketok #girlsonbikes
item.description: Always remember to look both ways before you cross I guess #motorcycle #Fyp #bikelife #biketok #girlsonbikes
item.author: ninja_zoomies

item.title: I tried 😩 #motorcycle #Fyp #bikelife #biketok #girlsonbikes
item.description: I tried 😩 #motorcycle #Fyp #bikelife #biketok #girlsonbikes
item.author: ninja_zoomies

item.title: The only goal we have on group rides is to have fun and enjoy riding not to “disturb people’s peace”. If you’re looking for a quiet place maybe don’t go to the middle of the city! #motorcycle #Fyp #bikelife #biketok #girlsonbikes
item.description: The only goal we have on group rides is to have fun and enjoy riding not to “disturb people’s peace”. If you’re looking for a quiet place maybe don’t go to the middle of the city! #motorcycle #Fyp #bikelife #biketok #girlsonbikes
item.author: ninja_zoomies

item.title: I felt bad 😭 but I was on my way home #motorcycle #Fyp #bikelife #biketok #girlsonbikes
item.description: I felt bad 😭 but I was on my way home #motorcycle #Fyp #bikelife #biketok #girlsonbikes
item.author: ninja_zoomies

item.title: Took my friend for her first motorcycle ride ever! #motorcycle #Fyp #bikelife #biketok #girlsonbikes
item.description: Took my friend for her first motorcycle ride ever! #motorcycle #Fyp #bikelife #biketok #girlsonbikes
item.author: ninja_zoomies

item.title: Bikers will always catch up to each other! #motorcycle #Fyp #bikelife #biketok #girlsonbikes
item.description: Bikers will always catch up to each other! #motorcycle #Fyp #bikelife #biketok #girlsonbikes
item.author: ninja_zoomies

item.title: Bikes don’t trigger light changes and yes I know you can just go after waiting for so long #motorcycle #Fyp #bikelife #biketok #girlsonbikes
item.description: Bikes don’t trigger light changes and yes I know you can just go after waiting for so long #motorcycle #Fyp #bikelife #biketok #girlsonbikes

item.title: Pink lights make everything better 📸 @FlicksbyJames #motorcycle #Fyp #bikelife #biketok #girlsonbikes

item.author: ninja_zoomies

item.title: Yes, I sold my bike. I’m so thankful for the friends, experience, and memories this bike brought to me. I’m thankful for the 16,000 people who have decided to follow my journey on TikTok. This was my first bike and I’m incredibly sad to see it go. I hope
item.description: Yes, I sold my bike. I’m so thankful for the friends, experience, and memories this bike brought to me. I’m thankful for the 16,000 people who have decided to follow my journey on TikTok. This was my first bike and I’m incredibly sad to see it go. I hope
item.author: ninja_zoomies

item.title: It’s very cold in Wisconsin this week. Thinking back to warmer days 😌 #motorcycle #Fyp #bikelife #biketok #girlsonbikes
